Container.Name: Fodaris Agent
Container.Overview:
Fodaris Agent - lightweight monitoring agent that reports system metrics to your Fodaris server.
Collects CPU, memory, disk, network, temperature, process, and Docker container metrics. Metrics are encrypted in transit with AES-256-GCM.
Requires a running Fodaris server. Get your token from Settings > Endpoints in the Fodaris dashboard.
Container.Description:
Fodaris Agent collects system metrics (CPU, memory, disk, network, temperature, processes, Docker containers) and sends them to your Fodaris monitoring server. Metrics are encrypted in transit with AES-256-GCM.
Before installing, add this endpoint in your Fodaris dashboard (Settings > Endpoints) to get your token.

Config.Name: Server URL
Config.Description: URL of your Fodaris server. Use the server's IP address, not localhost.

Config.Name: Auth Token
Config.Description: Authentication token from your Fodaris dashboard (Settings > Endpoints).

Config.Name: Endpoint Name
Config.Description: Name shown in the Fodaris dashboard for this machine.

Config.Name: Verify SSL
Config.Description: Set to false if your Fodaris server uses a self-signed certificate (default). Set to true only for trusted CA-signed certs.

Config.Name: Collection Interval (seconds)
Config.Description: How often to collect and send metrics, in seconds. Default is 10.

Config.Name: Docker Socket
Config.Description: Grants the agent read-only access to Docker for container monitoring. Remove if not needed.
